name: Fukuyama Transporting Co., Ltd.
summary: Fukuyama Transporting Co., Ltd. operates as a logistics company in Japan, China, Hong Kong, Cambodia, Vietnam, Indonesia, Malaysia, and Thailand. The company offers freight transportation services using approximately 16,000 vehicles, including tractors, trailers, and trucks, as well as through sea, rail, and air sources. It also provides bonded warehouse and customs clearance services. In addition, it operates convenience stores; and offers vehicle maintenance, packaging, real estate rental, port operations, sports and recreational facilities management, personnel dispatch, security, industrial and household waste collection and disposal, printing, travel and insurance agency, products sale, and other services. The company also offers packaging, port operation, and other services. Fukuyama Transporting Co., Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Fukuyama, Japan.
